profile.name: Anas Tahir
profile.title: Full Stack & Android Developer
profile.about: I am a passionate Full Stack and Android Developer pursuing an M.Sc. in Computer Science at UGR Granada, Spain. I love building beautiful, functional applications that solve real-world problems — from AI-powered web apps to mobile experiences.

projects.title: DriveES — Car Rental Spain
projects.description: Full-stack premium car rental platform for Spain. Features microservices backend (auth, cars, booking, payment), dark red UI with 3D animations, real-time booking flow, MongoDB Atlas, JWT auth, PayPal integration, and admin dashboard with analytics.

projects.title: AI Football Predictor
projects.description: Daily football predictions powered by AI — uses ELO ratings, form, head-to-head stats, and live fixtures from football-data.org. Built with Next.js and deployed on Render.

projects.title: ShopCart — Spring Boot
projects.description: Full-stack shopping cart app with product management, category filtering, stock tracking, and Spring Security authentication. Features a modern dark UI with quantity controls.

projects.title: SoundWave — Music App
projects.description: Full-stack music sharing and discovery mobile app. Upload tracks, follow artists, real-time feed with Socket.IO, JWT auth, and audio streaming. React Native + Node.js + MongoDB.
